asset_name: Bronchogen AEDL Sequence and Cell-Model Evidence
source_domain: Primary publications identifying Bronchogen as Ala-Glu-Asp-Leu and reporting DNA interaction, plant-callus and aged human bronchial-cell culture findings
prohibited_use: Personal dosing, injection or reconstitution guidance
Cell, animal, organotypic or literature-material evidence transfer to supplier products
Assumption of supplier sequence, termini, salt, potency, quality or sterility
Anti-ageing, senolytic or organ-specific treatment protocols
